answers.what-who-where: growth marketer uses this plugin during the weekly standup to summarize last week's wins
answers.why-this-problem: context switching between ChatGPT and Notion AI wastes the team more than five hours per week
answers.how-it-works: plugin collects the user's standup notes from a local markdown file and emits a single digest
answers.ai-usage: the runtime tool surface is called once to summarize the weekly digest into bullet form
answers.how-verified: manual smoke test against the prior week's standup transcript plus a five-user beta review
